repo_signals: L3 smoke for code.search: Elasticsearch inverted index and mappings, custom analyzer and tokenization, BM25 relevance ranking, query DSL with bool clauses, recall vs precision tuning, and faceted aggregations
implement a payment webhook handler with signature verification

retrieval_query: elasticsearch opensearch inverted index bm25 relevance ranking analyzer tokenization full text search query dsl faceting recall precision mapping reindex

validation_smoke.name: code.search L3 validation smoke
signals: query analyzer matches the index analyzer for the field
mapping changes accompanied by a reindex plan
facet counts reconcile with filtered result totals
recall and precision both reported, not just one

diagnosis_smoke.name: code.search diagnosis smoke
signals: exact-looking query returns no hits due to analyzer mismatch
relevance tuned by eyeballing one query
a field typed as text when it should be keyword (or vice versa)
mapping changed in place with no reindex
high recall but low precision swamping users with noise
